articles.author: Meredith Cohn
articles.title: An army of ticks is sending more Marylanders to the ER - thebanner.com
articles.description: Across the country, emergency department visits for tick bites are up more than 25% from last year, according to federal data. Maryland and other northeastern states are looking like ground zero.
articles.content:
It may not feel quite like summer yet, but one seasonal pest is already out for blood.
